query: SELECT 'authors_with_avatar' as metric, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM author_profiles WHERE s3AvatarUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3AvatarUrl != '' UNION ALL SELECT 'authors_with_bio', COUNT(*) FROM author_profiles WHERE bio IS NOT NULL AND bio != '' UNION ALL SELECT 'books_with_cover', COUNT(*) FROM book_profiles WHERE s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3CoverUrl != '' UNION ALL SELECT 'books_with_summary', COUNT(*) FROM book_profiles WHERE summary IS NOT NULL AND summary != ''
